RASPBERRY TIRAMISU 💕✨ Welcome to Episode 17 of my tiramisu series! This Raspberry Tiramisu aka Raspberrymisu is long overdue, and my most requested flavor! It has definitely earned a spot up there. From the vibrant pink and sweet and sour flavors from the berries it’s hard not to love this dessert. It has a layer of raspberry mascarpone cream, raspberry dipped ladyfingers and a raspberry sauce topping. It’s a raspberry dream 😍 Add it to your summer dessert list ASAP. Ingredients  - 3/4 cup of homemade raspberry juice  - 1 ½ cups of heavy cream or double cream - 16 oz or 450g of mascarpone cheese - ¾ cup of granulated sugar - 1 teaspoons of vanilla extract - 260 g of Ladyfingers or enough to fill the dish Topping - Homemade raspberry sauce  - Fresh raspberries for topping  - Mint leaves for garnish  #raspberrytiramisu #raspberrydessert #uniquedesserts #tiramisunoegg  #adesserttomakeanydayspecial

This routine is for anyone who is not dealing with extreme damage but wants over all glossier & softer hair this is the the exact routine I built for getting glass hair on fine hair but will work for the wavy curly hair girls too!!  the science: the flatten your cuticle lies, the more light it reflects that's what gives the illusion of glass. glossy hair isn't a product, it's the consistency of routine over time that’s keeping that cuticle smooth from prewash to final styling  it took me a while to figure out the system, but once I did, the results compounded and now I wanna share my favourite tips with you because this is the routine that actually for every  wash day. the 5 things I never skip: 1. always create a barrier before shampoo: hair oil or conditioner first. less friction = less cuticle damage = more shine 2. weekly hair mask. deep hydration is what keeps that cuticle flat and the shine consistent. 3. a glossing treatment every 3-4 weeks  this is the step that takes glossy to glass  4. leave-in conditioner every single wash. beats frizz and keeps the cuticle flat between washes. 5. the hair sandwich method oil before heat styling AND after. then always finish with a cool shot to lock the cuticle in place ✨ Hope these haircare tips help you guys!! #hair #haircare #glasshair #hairgloss

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

#mascara                                    Un mascara est un produit de maquillage destiné à être appliqué sur les cils afin de les allonger, les épaissir, les recourber et intensifier le regard. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, contenu dans un tube avec une brosse applicatrice. Le mascara permet de donner plus de volume et de définition aux cils en les colorant, le plus souvent en noir, mais aussi en brun ou en couleurs plus originales. Selon sa formule et la forme de la brosse, il peut offrir différents effets : naturel, volumineux, allongeant ou recourbant. Facile à utiliser, il est un élément essentiel du maquillage des yeux, mais reste temporaire et s’enlève avec un démaquillant adapté.                     #lashes #prt #fyp #foryoupagе

Sushi Crêpes 🍱🥞🍓🥭 For the Pancakes: Ingredients: * 150g plain flour * 4 small to medium eggs * 450ml milk * 1 tbsp melted butter (plus extra for frying) * 1 tsp salt * 1 tbsp sugar Method: 1. In a large bowl or jug, whisk together the plain flour, eggs, milk, salt, and sugar until smooth. The batter should have a consistency similar to single cream. 2. Allow the batter to rest for 30 minutes, if you have time. If not, you can start cooking immediately. 3. Heat a medium frying pan or crêpe pan over medium heat and brush with a little melted butter. 4. Pour 1/3 cup of the batter into the pan, then swirl it around to evenly coat the surface. Cook the pancake for about 1 minute on each side, until golden brown. Flip the pancake to cook the other side. 5. Once done, transfer the pancakes to a plate and set aside. For the Chocolate Sauce: Ingredients: * 100g milk chocolate * 100g dark chocolate * 1/2 cup whipping cream * 2 tbsp honey Method: 1. In a bowl, combine the milk chocolate, dark chocolate, whipping cream, and honey. 2. Microwave for 30 seconds, then stir until smooth and fully melted. Set aside to cool slightly. For the Cream Filling: Ingredients: * 250ml double cream * 2 ½ tbsp caster sugar * 1 tsp vanilla extract Method: 1. In a mixing bowl, combine the double cream, caster sugar, and vanilla extract. 2. Whisk until stiff peaks form, then set aside. For the Pancake Fillings: Choose your favorite fillings to add to the pancakes, such as: * Biscoff biscuits * Biscoff spread * Oreo cookies * Chocolate spread * Fresh strawberries * Mango slices Assembly: 1. Spread a generous layer of cream filling/chocolate sauce  over each pancake. 2. Add your chosen fillings and roll or fold the pancakes like sushi. 3. Slice the rolled pancakes into bite-sized pieces. 4. Top with some more chocolate sauce or any sweet sauce you like.  5. Serve and enjoy your delicious sushi pancakes! #Recipe #homecooking #chula_buonapettito #sushi #crepes #creperoll #fruits #bananas #strewberry #mangos #oreo #biscoff #sushicrepe

Homemade franui with raspberry chocolate 🩷 3-ingredient easy recipe!  Ingredients for 35 franui  35 fresh raspberries 180g white chocolate 160g white chocolate + 20g raspberry chocolate (I used Valrhona framboise inspiration) Instructions Place raspberries on a tray and freeze for about 1 hour. Melt white chocolate over a double boil or in the microwave (low power, you don't want to burn it!) Use a toothpick to dip each raspberry with white chocolate. Shake excess chocolate. Place on a tray and freeze. Meanwhile, melt white + raspberry chocolate (or any other chocolate). Coat each raspberry and place back into the freezer for 30 minutes. Vitamin C, also known as ascorbic acid, is a water-soluble vitamin that humans, unlike most vertebrate animals, are unable to produce on their own. In addition, vitamin C plays a role in collagen synthesis — a protein vital for the health of the skin, bones, cartilage, and blood vessels — as well as in iron absorption, the synthesis of certain hormones, and energy metabolism. Its importance also extends from the wound healing process to the prevention of cardiovascular diseases. #vitaminc #orange #healing #edit #foryou

Lay flat on counter → run finger along sleeve to spread chocolate edge-to-edge (thin shell). Whip cream till firm → mix in condensed milk + vanilla. Blow into sleeve to open center. Caramel fudge :  Dans une casserole versez 190g de lait concentré sucré, 40g de beurre, une pointe de miel, un peu de vanille, une bonne pincée de fleur de sel et 40g de vergeoise brune.  Placez sur feu doux, mélangez jusqu’à l’ébullition. À l’ébullition mélangez encore 3 bonnes minutes puis versez le caramel sur la pâte à cookie.  Faire fondre 100g de chocolat au lait ajouter une cuillère à soupe d’huile neutre et bien mélanger. Korean Popcorn Chicken 🍿🍗 For all of you asking about the app, search “Osta” on the app or Google play store ‼️🫶 The crispiest korean porocrn chicken… sweet, spicy and so simple. You can also make this in the air fryer!!🔥 For the Chicken: -2 lb chicken thighs or breasts, cut into 1 inch cubes -2 eggs -2 tbsp rice vinegar -6 garlic cloves, minced -1 tbsp fresh ginger, grated -Seasonings: 2 tsp garlic powder, 2 tsp onion powder, 2 tsp salt, 1 tsp black pepper, 1 tsp gochugaru (optional) -1/4 cup cornstarch -1/2 cup all-purpose flour -Neutral oil, for frying For the Sauce: -1.5 tbsp gochujang -2 tsp sesame seeds -3 tbsp ketchup -4 garlic cloves, minced -1.5 tbsp honey -3 tbsp butter -1 tbsp rice vinegar -1 tbsp soy sauce -2 tsp sesame oil -1 tsp gochugaru (optional) Garnish: -Sesame seeds -Green onions, sliced Instructions: 1. In a bowl, combine chicken with eggs, vinegar, garlic, ginger, & seasonings. Mix well & marinate as long as you wish (1 hour ideal, 1 min works). →For frying: add the cornstarch & flour directly into the same bowl and mix until evenly coated & sticky. →For air frying: do NOT add flour yet. You’ll coat it separately in step 2. 2. For frying: skip this step & go to step 3. For air frying: in a new bowl, mix cornstarch & flour. Remove chicken from marinade then toss in dry ingredients until fully coated. Press lightly so it sticks. 3. For frying: heat neutral oil to 350°F / 175°C. Fry in batches for 7–8 mins until golden and crispy, transfer to a rack. 4. For air frying: oil the basket & spray/brush the chicken with oil. Cook at 375°F for 8 mins, flip, cook for 6–8 mins more until crispy & cooked through. Work in batches. 5. In a pan over medium-low heat, combine gochujang, ketchup, sesame seeds, garlic, honey, rice vinegar, soy sauce, sesame oil, & optional gochugaru. Bring to a simmer, add butter, stir until melted, remove from heat. 6. Add the chicken directly to the sauce & toss OR in a mixing bowl, combine your desired amount of sauce with the chicken to control how saucy it gets. 7. Serve over jasmine rice, garnish with sesame seeds & green onions. Enjoy :) #recipesoftiktok #chicken #Recipe #cookingathometiktoktv

Корпусные творожные десерты малина, манго, тирамису☕️ Из этого у меня получилось 9 малинок, 10 манго, 8 кофейных. Эти десерты невероятно яркие, ароматные, сочные, как мои скрабы от RICHE 😍 После зимы кожа особенно нуждается в уходе, скрабы мягко отшелушивают, питают маслами и делают кожу очень нежной и гладкой к лету. Артикулы на скрабы на ozon: кофейный - арт. 242785392 кокосовый - арт. 1422273708 манго-ананас - арт. 242807269 Берём Для основы: • творог 5% (брикет) — 360 г • мягкий творог 5% — 240 г  • сгущёнка — 100 г • белый шоколад — 150 г • сливки (для шоколада) — 50 мл • сливки 33% — 500 мл • желатин — 20 г • вода для желатина — по инструкции Для начинок: • малиновый джем — по вкусу • джем из экзотических фруктов — по вкусу • какао — 2 ст. л. • печенье савоярди — 4 шт • эспрессо — 60 мл Для глазури: Малина: • белый шоколад — 180 г • какао-масло — 75 г • красный жирорастворимый краситель Манго: • белый шоколад — 100 г • какао-масло — 40 г • жёлтый жирорастворимый краситель Кофе: • молочный шоколад — 180 г • какао-масло — 75 г Как готовим:  1. Белый шоколад со сливками растапливаем на водяной бане. В миске соединяем творог, мягкий творог, сгущёнку и растопленный шоколад. Пробиваем блендером 1–2 минуты до гладкой кремовой текстуры.  2. Холодные сливки взбиваем до мягких пиков. Желатин замачиваем по инструкции, даём набухнуть 15 минут, затем прогреваем до жидкого состояния ( в микроволновке 25 сек) В основу сначала вводим желатин, перемешиваем, затем аккуратно вмешиваем сливки (не взбиваем!).  3. Выкладываем основу в форму малинок, в центр добавляем малиновый джем, закрываем основой. В формы с манго так же крем и в центр — экзотический джем.  4. В оставшуюся часть основы добавляем какао, перемешиваем. Выкладываем слой, затем печенье савоярди, пропитанное эспрессо, сверху закрываем основой.  5. Убираем десерты в морозилку до полного застывания (лучше на ночь).  6. Для глазури шоколад с какао-маслом растапливаем, перемешиваем до однородности. Добавляем жирорастворимый краситель (для цвета). Полностью замороженные десерты достаём из форм и покрываем глазурью. За счёт температуры десерта шоколад схватывается сразу, образуя ровный корпус. Обязательно убираем в холодильник для стабилизации.  Такие десерты можно хранить в морозилке и доставать за 1-2 часа  до чаепития 🥰
